title: Flintronic Tile Leveling System, 80PCS Resuable Tile Leveling System Kit with 2 Special Wrenches, Tile Leveling Clips Tile Installation Tool for Stone and Floors
features: 【TILE LEVELING KIT】It is a great tool to help DIY and professional tile installers. And ensure flatnessbetween tiles to prevent them from moving during the cement laying process. Achieving a perfect flat surface without cracks

【PRECISE LEVELING】The tile leveler uses the principle of force to adjust the tiles to a flatter effect. For use with brick joint widths 1.5mm - 6m and all formats and panel thicknesses 5mm - 17mm. And the special wrench provided makes it easy to fix or remove

【EASY TO USE】The tile leveling system kit is easy to use, insert the T-shaped needle into the gap and rotate it 90 degrees to secure it to the base of the tile. Then turn the lid clockwise so that the 2 tiles are at the same level for a perfectly flat surface. After 4-6 hours, before the cement/adhesive sets, remove it for reuse by turning it in the opposite direction with a wrench.

【HIGH QUALITY】The tile Leveling System Kit is made of high-quality pp material andHard nickel manganese steel, which has excellent toughness, high-quality oil resistance, heat resistance and corrosion resistance. Not prone to cracking, ensuring even spacing and better leveling of tiles every time.

【WIDELY USED】The Tile Leveling System Kit is compatible with all kinds of tiles and can fit the tiles tightly. Includes wall tiles, smaller floor tiles and mosaic tiles. Can be used in a variety of scenarios, including outdoor tiles and tiles in the courtyard.
